descriptionShort: Interview with Trevor Dickie from the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes Hall of Fame reunion event.
descriptionLong: This is an interview with Trevor Dickie recorded during the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night and BC Hockey Hall of Fame commemoration events. Dickie was a member of the 1987 Centennial Cup-winning team and shares memories and reflections from that historic season.
